title: Quality Assurance Procedure for aerosol high-power lidars
author: CARS
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: These procedures apply to the ACTRIS aerosol remote sensing National Facilities and to the EARLINET-ACTRIS associated lidar stations.
steps_raw: These procedures apply to the ACTRIS aerosol remote sensing National Facilities and to the EARLINET-ACTRIS associated lidar stations.
